data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Certified mail and return receipt options', which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or confirmation regarding the implementation of these options. The absence of relevant evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: Missing implementation of certified mail and return receipt options.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
